text: ICICI Prudential PSU Equity Fund Direct Growth is a Equity mutual fund scheme from ICICI Prudential Mutual Fund with a risk level rated as Very High. Latest NAV as of 2026-04-21 is ₹23.73.

text: Risk level: Very High. Standard deviation: 18.35. Sharpe ratio: 1.17. Alpha: 1.03. Beta: 0.81.

fund_name: ICICI Prudential PSU Equity Fund Direct Growth
text: Expense ratio is 0.79%. Exit load policy: Exit Load 1% if redeem before 1 month from the date of allotment. Minimum SIP investment is ₹100. Minimum lump-sum investment is ₹5000. Taxation: Returns are taxed at 20%, if you redeem before one year. After 1 year, you are required to pay LTCG tax of 12.5% on returns of Rs 1.25 lakh+ in a financial year.
